title: GLM 5.2 and the coming AI margin collapse
summary: 文章探讨了GLM 5.2模型发布对AI行业的影响，预测AI利润率将因模型商品化和竞争加剧而崩溃。
highlights: GLM 5.2 marks a turning point in AI model commoditization.
The margin collapse is inevitable as open-source alternatives catch up.
Profit margins for proprietary AI models are expected to shrink dramatically.
